title: Dungeons and Tavern Keys 32x
description: 32x version of the Keys from Dungeons and Taverns
body:
My first attempt at a resource pack.

![showcase of all the keys added by DNT retextured](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4151098f067a5c0ae89a8152b9e38e5fb6f3aeba.png)

I just recently started using Dungeons and Taverns and saw it added custom items that no one had upscaled/retextured to 32x before, so I figured I would give it a shot. Obviously, the textures are based on the textures of the original items added by DNT. However, I also used portions of the Trial Key by the faithful 32x team as inspiration for my 32x version of the keys so credit to each team respectively.
